title: Radioactive in vitro transcription
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"8n4ln","text":"Protocol for radioactive labelling of RNA using T7-Polymerase and α-[32P]-UTP.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"sup","offset":69,"length":2}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 5x Ribomax buffer: 400 mM Hepes-KOH, pH 7.5; 60 mM MgCl 2 ; 10 mM spermidine; 200 mM DTT

PCR Product containing the T7-Promoter (100 ng - 1 µg) Ribomax buffer 6 µL Pyrophosphatase 1 µL RNase inhibitor 0.5 µL DTT (1 M) 2 µL ATP 10 mM 1.8 µL CTP 10 mM 1.8 µL GTP 10 mM 1.8 µL α-[ 32 P]-UTP 3 µL T7 RNA-Polymerase 1 µL H 2 O ad 30 µL Incubate reaction for at least 2 hours at 37˚C. 02:00:00
Remove excessive radioactive nucleotides by cleaning the probe using a G-50 column (GE-Healthcare).
Generate a PCR product using primers containing the T7-promoter. Gel-extract or clean up using column purification.
creator: Anna Behle
